task_completion.description: Create 'Customer' and 'Order Fulfillment' pools, with 'Order Processing' and 'Warehouse' lanes in the latter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a BPMN diagram on the EdrawMax canvas containing two main pools labeled 'Customer' and 'Order Fulfillment'. The 'Order Fulfillment' pool must be subdivided into two lanes labeled 'Order Processing' and 'Warehouse'.

task_completion.description: Add all required BPMN elements to the 'Order Processing' lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Order Processing' lane for a start event ('Order Received'), two tasks ('Validate Order', 'Check Inventory'), an exclusive gateway diamond ('In Stock?'), another task ('Notify Customer'), and an end event ('Order Cancelled').

task_completion.description: Add all required BPMN elements to the 'Warehouse' lane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'Warehouse' lane for three tasks ('Pick Items', 'Pack Order', 'Ship Order') and an end event ('Order Delivered').

task_completion.description: Connect elements with sequence flows, including correct branching from the 'In Stock?' gateway.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for solid lines with arrows connecting the elements in a logical flow. Specifically, verify that the 'In Stock?' gateway has a sequence flow pointing to 'Pick Items' (for 'Yes') and another pointing to 'Notify Customer' (for 'No').

task_completion.description: Include at least one message flow between the 'Customer' pool and the 'Order Fulfillment' pool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dashed line with an open arrowhead (BPMN message flow) connecting the 'Customer' pool to the 'Order Fulfillment' pool or to an element within it.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as an .eddx file and export it as a .png file in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for EdrawMax save/export dialogs, terminal commands, or a file manager window showing 'bpmn_order_fulfillment.eddx' and 'bpmn_order_fulfillment.png' successfully created in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the EdrawMax application interface with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than terminal commands generating XML/EDDX files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the required text into a text editor or script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the required labels ('Customer', 'Order Fulfillment', etc.) appear inside actual BPMN graphical shapes within EdrawMax, not in a plain text file or terminal echo command.

integrity.description: Verify the diagram was constructed element by element.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps in the screenshots showing the drag-and-drop or creation of individual BPMN shapes and connectors, rather than just opening a pre-existing image or file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required text labels in the diagram must exactly match: 'Customer', 'Order Fulfillment', 'Order Processing', 'Warehouse', 'Order Received', 'Validate Order', 'Check Inventory', 'In Stock', 'Notify Customer', 'Order Cancelled', 'Pick Items', 'Pack Order', 'Ship Order', 'Order Delivered'. The final files must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/bpmn_order_fulfillment.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/bpmn_order_fulfillment.png'.
